obstacle_groups.label: Upper left rail — near top edge
Upper right rail — near top edge
Left yard tower — full mid-height on left edge
Right yard tower — full mid-height on right edge
Center-left block — upper area, flanking laser lane
Center-right block — upper area, flanking laser lane
Bottom support — near bottom edge, gap at x=6-8 for laser

splitters.note: Laser going UP from (7,19) hits this → splits LEFT+RIGHT at y=14.
LEFT beam from splitter 1 travels along y=14 to (2,14) → splits UP+DOWN. UP beam travels to upper-left rail at y=3; DOWN beam travels to bottom support at y=17.
